programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Vollmer, a small-time neo-Nazi, takes advice from a shadowy benefactor on how to increase his followers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: Takedown
programme.desc: When an arrest compromises a drug bust, Andy steps up to salvage the bust by going undercover with Swarek.

programme.title: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a student is killed in a shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club.

programme.title: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences.

programme.title: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in a laundromat fire.

programme.title: Stung
programme.desc: Using a car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants

programme.title: In Plain View
programme.desc: When an informant is murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the East Jameson gang.

programme.title: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman is attacked in the same way as a deceased cop. Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine.

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident.

programme.title: A Little Faith
programme.desc: On an undercover training exercise Traci and Andy stumble upon a woman who is about to die of an overdose.

programme.title: On the Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer.

programme.title: God's Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of a police car.

programme.title: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a black teenager

programme.title: Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: Hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver.

programme.title: Messy Houses
programme.desc: When Andy answers a domestic disturbance call, the social worker turns out to be her estranged mother.

programme.title: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: A gifted psychic (or a gifted conman) helps find the missing witness in an organized-crime case.

programme.title: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 726
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious VERT HURT, keep kids in their place with YOUTH SLAYERS and get over-caffeinated with ROTHROCKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, radio and TV star Charlemagne Tha God joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to PUT SOME RESPECK ON MY NAME, call out the DONKEYS OF THE DAY and realize some people are just DILDO DUMB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel take a much needed "Karate Break", try to figure out what's wrong with some highly "Defective Pets", and play a classic game of "Heads Or Tails?"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 730
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip-hop duo Rae Sremmurd joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to celebrate the "Sremmlife," get hurt "Worse Than It Looks" and have somebody "Come Get Her"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 725

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Teyana Taylor joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to pay tribute to KID NAPPERS, and tell us about BIRTHDAY ASSASSINS, and what it's like to be in a LUST BUBBLE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some DEAD POOLS, go into CARROT SHOCK and learn a valuable life lesson that EVERYTHING FARTS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 721
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have NASCAR's Chase Elliott talk about "Hall Of Fame Dads," suffer a "Victory Lapse," and get a helping hand from some "Personal Pit Crews."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to enjoy some "Dudebrations", witness the pain of "Dud Perfect," and learn about the dangers of "Bad Garretts."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: On a new episode of Ridiculousness, actor and rapper Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob to celebrate "Wild Boys," fend off the "Fun Police" and learn you can never be too scared of "Sky Coffins."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 13

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 14

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 15

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 17

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 19

programme.desc: Master of Mediterranean cuisine, Yotam Ottolenghi's mystery box challenge gives contestants 75 minutes to create a delicious dish to gain an advantage going into the invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test must cook off to avoid elimination in a pressure test set by the master of Mediterranean cuisine, Yotam Ottolenghi.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 28
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test must first face off for a chance to cook against a professional chef for immunity. Does an amateur have what it takes to defeat a professional?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Split into two teams, each group must prepare a Yotam Ottolenghi-style vegetarian feast for a group of meat lovers. The team that serves the least impressive feast will be up for elimination.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The perfect storm is brewing in Samoa as the tribes fight to protect supplies & maintain fire in adverse conditions. However, how will the prospect of a idol at play tamper with new friendships?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As a major alliance crumbles, one tribe scrambles to avoid elimination. The other tribe grows frustrated with two members and make moves to have them removed next.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Food is the only thing on the minds of the castaways as one member from each camp faces a painful moral dilemma which could have dramatic ramifications for the tribemates & their own game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the castaways endure further wind & rain without fire & shelter before a lengthy immunity challenge finishing with the next Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Blatant lies at the last tribal council has put everyone in one camp on edge. Will they be able to put their differences aside to win the reward challenge or will they leave hungry?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A brutal tribal council the night before has left one castaway on the war path seeking retribution. At the immunity challenge the tribes must take part in a physical Sumo'an contest.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: As both tribes appear to reach their wits' end, the prospect of a luxurious and cleansing reward could be enough to keep the castaways in the game for weeks to come.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Winning immunity has never been so vital to resettling the balance within each tribe, and with a highly competitive challenge that encourages fair contact, things are sure to get feisty.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Social divisions begin to exhaust castaways as one tribe breaks down ahead of the next immunity challenge. Will they be able to come together to avoid another visit to tribal council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Aligned castaways find themselves at each other's throats over who is doing enough work around camp, but is one player acting lazy to divide the tribe?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A surprise challenge sees one castaway return to camp with an unexpected power that could push tensions to breaking point. Later, will one castaway past come back to haunt them at tribal council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Alliances continue to flip as a former power player finds themselves at the bottom of their tribe and a last minute scramble to return to their former glory will turn friend against friend.

programme.title: Survivor US S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Sixteen Americans are marooned on a remote island in the South China Sea, as the reality/adventure series.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1304
programme.desc: Chloe gets jealous of Holly and Marty and kicks off. Scott receives some big news and there's a shock arrival which has huge consequences for Gaz and Chantelle. (S13, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1305
programme.desc: It's seriously awks between Sophie, Gaz and Chantelle. Aaron finally returns but Marnie isn't happy. Chantelle and Marty clash over Chloe. Nathan takes getting mortal to the next level. (S13, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1306
programme.desc: It's the morning after Chantelle's departure... Sophie gets some big news from boss Anna, Aaron ends up in an ambulance and Chloe goes all out to get over Marty at the pool party. (S13, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1307
programme.desc: Marty ends up in hospital after the beach party. Meanwhile, Boss Anna has some big news for Sophie, Nathan has an unusual plan to help Chloe, and Gaz comes to a decision over Charlotte. (S13, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1308
programme.desc: It's Holly's birthday and she gets a massive surprise when Kyle shows up. Marty goes in on Chloe but takes it too far. Meanwhile, Aaron and Marnie's relationship reaches breaking point. (S13, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1309
programme.desc: The Geordies reach boiling point... Marty tries to make it up to Chloe, but will she forgive him? And is there any way back for Aaron and Marnie after the previous night's break up? (S13, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1310
programme.desc: In the series finale Chloe and Marty get flirty again, but can they really stay just good friends? Kyle gets some big news from Boss Anna, but the fallout will change the family forever. (S13, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: It all kicks off when eight Geordies become housemates. Vicky can't decide if she prefers Jay or Greg, Greg wants to leave, and Holly, the only housemate in a relationship, is unfaithful.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Jay's aware that he's bitten off more than he can chew with Vicky, Charlotte fights off advances from Gaz, whilst Sophie gets the shock of her life when her parents turn up unannounced.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: It's Jay's birthday and Vicky's playing the dutiful 'girlfriend', Holly's boyfriend visits, Charlotte loses the battle to fight off Gaz and the house is rocked by a shock departure!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 104

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Holly makes a surprise return to the Geordie Shore house, but not before Jay and Gaz face their toughest work assignment at a working man's club. Anna pushes Vicky too far.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 106

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 150
programme.desc: The cast reunites along with their friends, family to unravel the truths of those involved and to talk about socks, chlamydia and the never ending parsnip.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 151
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore cast head to Magaluf for the summer hols. The lads quickly make up for lost time with the ladies, and tensions explode with Char and Gaz, resulting in the biggest Geordie bust-up yet!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 152
programme.desc: There's more Magaluf madness as the gang struggle to get along. Under the watchful eye of Charlotte and Vicky, Gary continues to charm the ladies, and Holly rocks another wet t-shirt contest!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Yes, it's time to 'get on it like a car bonnet'! Series 2 kicks off with two feisty new housemates joining the house... but will it be a warm welcome or a frosty reception? (S2, ep1)

programme.desc: It all kicks off when eight Geordies become housemates. Vicky can't decide if she prefers Jay or Greg, Greg wants to leave, and Holly, the only housemate in a relationship, is unfaithful.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Jenni plans a surprise birthday party for Roger that goes south, Deena auditions Danny to be a meatball and the roommates find themselves in the middle of a brawl at the club. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: Jenni wonders where she stands with Roger and realises they might be in more trouble than she thought. Mike decides it is time for him to take his relationship with Paula to the next level. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Mike adjusts to being in a relationship and gets confused about the rules. Deena goes back to her meatball ways, but has to fight for her right to party. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: Sammi confronts Deena about her meatball antics and the two of them go head-to-head. Mike and the roommates get to know Paula's wild side, and Mike isn't sure he can handle it. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 609
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Jersey Shore kicks off when eight soon-to-be roommates move into a summer share. Romance heats up in the house and the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Feeling like an outcast, Snooki tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. The roommates' first club night out gets flirty. Mike and Sammy's situation turns into a love triangle. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: The love triangle gets even more intense when Ronnie catches Sammy giving her number to another guy. And a housemate chooses to leave the Shore for good. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Pauly and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this season finale, tension comes to a head as Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2

programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 2

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 24

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S11 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The house, formerly owned by the \\"Father of American Surgery,\\" harbors a dark secret deep beneath its floors. Now restless spirits inhabit the home in which they were once the subjects of experiments and research.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Rochester, New York to investigate the Rochester Public Library's 15 years of claims. There's reason to believe that two deaths associated with the building could be behind the activity.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7

programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.desc: The Sheriff of Nottingham unleashes a monster to massacre Robin Hood's men and capture Maid Marian.

programme.desc: A farmboy-turned-pirate encounters obstacles and enemies in his quest to be reunited with his true love.

programme.desc: Helga's older sister, Olga, comes home from college -- much to Helga's displeasure -- and quickly garners all of her parents' attention. /Arnold and Gerald have been saving up cereal box tops to get a telescope before the arrival of Salley's Comet.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do by his parents, Timmy wishes that he would have to do the opposite of whatever his parents told him. Timmy wishes he was a teenager to ride the cool new ride at the amusement park.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Big Fairy Share Scare: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Freeze Frame/Phoebe Cheats: Arnold and Gerald catch a suspicious man on film and they follow him clue-to-clue.In an effort to win a class poetry contest, Phoebe copies a poem from a book.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: Arnold accidentally breaks a promise he made to Iggy and must deal with the consequences. / Big Bob hires a nanny for Helga. Helga fights the nanny at her own game and forces her to leave.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Play Date... of Doom/Teacher's Pet: Foop is back! He’s escaped from prison and convinced Cosmo and Wanda he’s ready for a playdate with Poof. But he’s really there to try and destroy his arch enemy again, and it’s up to Timmy and Poof to thwart his plan.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When the news comes to Madtown to show the new Blader Bowl Otto decides it's his chance to make it to the big time.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Phoebe Takes the Fall/The Pig War: Phoebe agrees to take a dive so that Helga can win a competition./The boys engage in a recreation of a historical battle, only this time their prized pig is in danger of losing his life.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid: Poof gets the "Chicken Poofs" and turns everyone into actual chickens! Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him and go to the school "Romance Dance."

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Josh befriends Drake's doppelganger, a classmate named Drew, and Drake becomes jealous, fearing that Josh is trying to replace him.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When Dub's brother shows up at Game Shakers and invites everyone except Dub to his wedding, the kids convince him to bring his brother into the fold, promising to make Dub behave himself at the event.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers are kicked out of Fooders to make room for a guest who has his photo on the wall, Babe is determined to get their own photo up using any means necessary. Game Component: "Spitty Llama" (App)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh find out Megan have adopted a pet sheep, they want nothing to do with it.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Big Time Rush has just dropped their second album and the guys get interviewed on an entertainment tonight-type program where they answer revealing questions about their life inside and outside of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Babe is upset to learn that Mason Kendal is moving, so Kenzie designs her a virtual reality version of Mason. Babe loves it, but gets a little too swept up in the experience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Kenzie is hypnotized into being very, very hungry after the Game Shakers take her to see a hypnotist for her birthday.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 316
programme.desc: Dub recommends Kenzie see an eccentric pet plastic surgeon in order to fix her cat's loud nose holes. Meanwhile, Trip tries to get Hudson into a Boy Band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The Palm Woods school is having it's annual Prom and Carlos, James, Logan and Kendall are all determined to win the prom king title, doing whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the guys prepare for their first band photo, which could land them into all the teen magazines.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's been three months since the boys of Big Time Rush moved to Hollywood to record their demos. Now its now up to Griffin to decides the future of the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: In an attempt to seal a promotional partnership with Clam Jumper, the Game Shakers try to hack a billboard and live-stream their new game.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake and Josh compete in a contest where a new Plasma Screen TV is the grand prize but refuse to include Megan who turns out to to be their toughest competition.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Babe tries to plan the perfect date when she finds out that Henry Hart is coming to New York to visit her.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After meeting Susan, Drake's new girlfriend, Josh becomes convinced that her flirtation is more than friendly behavior.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo help Carlos find a date, and Logan flirts with a new girl while still confused about his feelings for Camille. James wants to help Katie get closer to her new crush, but becomes like an overprotective father.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Tiny Pickles: Babe and Kenzie's new game is ready, but Dub promises the world another game based on a crazy dream he had. The kids make his game and it's terrible. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo confront the future of their relationship when she lands her dream role in a movie blockbuster that will film overseas for the next three years.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 121
programme.desc: Buck the Magic Rat: Kenzie saves a rat in the subway and the kids are grossed out. But it starts bringing them luck and they all use it to solve their problems. (S1, ep 21)

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 318
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie's school project tops the gaming charts as an online sensation! Rapper Double G finds out they used his song and comes to collect his share. Despite their differences, the group teams up to create Game Shakers!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: The Game Shakers have to figure out how to break the news to Dub that they broke his expensive new television.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Griffin films the guys' lives for a reality show.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A classroom competition to make the Palm Woods more environmentally-friendly turns disastrous.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 123
programme.desc: When Hudson releases false information about a secret level in a game, Game Shakers is besieged by angry, crazy fans. Babe goes on a date with Mason Kendal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: The Game Shakers set Hudson up with a let's play account to help promote their games, but things quickly get out of hand when Hudson puts on Dub's rocket boots for fun.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo tells them they have to stay in LA to record a three-song Christmas EP, and it looks like they'll be spending their first Christmas away from home.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: After Josh ruins Drake's chances at having a hit song in the Superbowl, the boys must find a way to make things right. Along for the ride are a crazy houseguest, a bride, and one really big shrimp.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Gustavo has to go away on business, he lets the guys house-sit his mansion. While the boys do their best to keep the house in pristine condition, they inevitably destroy everything inside that Gustavo values.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Its date night at the Palm Woods. James helps Carlos on his date with one of the Jennifers, Kendall joins Lucy’s dinner with her parents, and Logan takes a blind date out so he can spy on Camille's date with Jett.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Dirty Blob: After Trip accidentally destroys a copy of the Game Shakers' latest game, the kids must sneak into Dub's studio to retrieve a copy of the game from his tablet. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lucy releases her revenge album about Kendall and it becomes a huge hit! James, desperate for attention, creates a rumor that he and Cher Lloyd are recording a duet, and Carlos gets bad press after he appears to hit an old lady.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake decides that he and Josh are going to be the first to ride the Demonator, the fastest and scariest rollercoaster opening tomorrow at Mystic Mountain.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When a crime show decides to film reenactments at the Premiere, fantasy and reality collide as Josh uproariously finds himself cast as the lead. San Diego's most wanted Movie Bandit!

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Drake wins a free skydive off a helicopter and goes off to do it despite his parents saying no. Josh, being the good brother he is, tries to stop him, but ends up going along for the ride.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Drake and Josh are left in charge for the weekend and quickly exhaust their funds and turn the house into a bed and breakfast as a source of income.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 220
programme.desc: A failed hacking attempt and blackmail put the Game Shakers' big deal with Clam Jumper in jeopardy.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A six-year-old argument between Drake and Josh is suddenly rekindled when their conflicting accounts of a incident at a San Diego Padres game finds them each placing the blame on the other.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The record company CEO thinks adding a fifth band member will broaden Big Time Rush’s appeal and sticks the guys with a self-proclaimed 'bad boy', who tries to inject dissension and tension within the group.
